title: Vacations
overview: Her distant husband refusing to join, a mother spends the holidays alone with her children for the first time. Lost in her life, she opens up to a seducing and strange and young man, who slowly draws her into his dark trap.

trailers.title: VACANCES de Béatrice Sebbah de Staël et Léo Wolfenstein, avec Géraldine Nakache
